scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run sync && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,docs -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-docs run dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test
scripts.test:quick: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test:quick
scripts.test:lib: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run test
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run test:ci:unit && pnpm run playwright:install && pnpm run test:ci:e2e
scripts.test:ci:unit: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run eslint:txt && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/rust run test && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run test && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run test && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-unit run test
scripts.test:ci:e2e: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run build && REF_TEST_FRESH=1 pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test
scripts.test:system: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run eslint:txt && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,lib,unit -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-unit run test"
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,unit -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/core run test" "pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-unit run test" && REF_TEST_FRESH=1 pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test:quick
scripts.test:e2e:dev: pnpm --filter @reference-ui/lib run build && REF_TEST_PROJECT=react18-vite5 pnpm --filter @reference-ui/reference-e2e run test:dev
